finding: Within a pool, members serving the same disaggregated AGC are highly synchronized (within-corr 0.84-0.95) regardless of battery duration; cross-pool correlation ~0.01; recovery on emergent streams = 1.0. NOTE: SoC saturation under an equalizing split is SHARED across co-members (synchronized dropout), so it does NOT lower within-pool homogeneity; gamma<1 instead arises from member heterogeneity (unequal capacity, staggered or partial membership), which Section 8.8 sweeps as an abstract knob.
